description: A surface mining dispatch center needs to promote their experienced dispatch officer to supervisor status to handle expanded operations. Log in to OpenCAD (http://localhost) as administrator (admin@opencad.local / Admin123!) and edit the 'Dispatch Officer' user account (dispatch@opencad.local, DISP-01) to grant them supervisor privileges. Only change the supervisor privilege setting; do not modify the user's admin privilege level, approved status, or other account details. The user should remain active/approved after the change.
